summary: Iter33 â€” Voita funnel REFRAME (lessonâ†’reportâ†’emailâ†’applyâ†’prediction) validated end-to-end. Backend pytest 11/11 PASS (test_sprint_voita_lessons.py): GET /api/settings/public exposes voita_quiz_config with all 5 lessons (bias_favorite, read_consensus, wrong_pattern, analysis_priority, apply_mode) â€” each carries lesson_number, lesson_title_fi/en, reveal_heading_fi/en, reveal_fact_fi/en, reveal_why_fi/en, reveal_application_fi/en + options with reveal_personalized_fi/en + tag; voita_predictor_profiles returns 10 profiles with slug/priority/is_default/name_fi-en/diagnosis_fi-en/weakness_fi-en/edge_fi-en/hooks/match_rules; curious_learner is the single is_default. POST /api/voita/profile/resolve: {bias_favorite, wrong_pattern_loyalty, analysis_priority_h2h} â†’ confident_loyalist (THE CONFIDENT LOYALIST) âś“; {bias_underdog, read_consensus_y} â†’ underdog_hunter (2 matches beats quiet_sharp's 1) âś“; {read_consensus_y, analysis_priority_consensus} â†’ quiet_sharp (priority 90 + 2 matches) âś“; {} â†’ curious_learner is_default âś“. PUT /api/admin/settings compliance linter blocks 'increase your win rate' in voita_quiz_config.reveal_fact_en âś“ and 'guarantee a win' in voita_predictor_profiles[].diagnosis_en âś“; existing 'guaranteed loss' (house-edge education) round-trips fine, not blocked âś“. Single-profile edit (curious_learner.edge_en marker) persists then restores cleanly. Regression: 41/41 PASS (test_sprint_voita_hero + test_sprint_voita_engine + test_sprint_voita_recent_winners) â€” hero banner, raffle CRUD, winners corner unchanged. Frontend e2e on /voita/kups-hjk-veikkausliiga-final-2026: intro-start-cta reads 'TAKE THE LESSON â€” 90 SECONDS â†’' with 90-second lesson + personal predictor report promise. Quiz-step-bias_favorite has 'LESSON 1 OF 5' eyebrow. Picking first option auto-advances to lesson-reveal-bias_favorite (~320 ms) showing all four blocks (lesson-reveal-fact / why / personalized / application). lesson-reveal-continue reads 'NEXT LESSON â†’' on Lessons 1â€“4 and switches to 'SEE MY REPORT â†’' on Lesson 5 (isLast). After Lesson 5 reveal continue â†’ report-step renders with report-profile-name='THE QUIET SHARP' (resolver fired correctly â€” tight-consensus + Sharpness picks resolved quiet_sharp slug via priority 90 / 2 matches) + populated diagnosis (138 chars), weakness (122), edge (106), hooks (165). report-continue says 'SAVE MY REPORT â†’'. Email gate shows 'Send your report. Get weekly signals.' headline + 'SEND ME MY REPORT â†’' button (data-testid=email-gate-submit). Filling email+age+rules+submit â†’ apply-step with 'APPLY YOUR LESSON' eyebrow + 'START PREDICTION â†’' (data-testid=apply-continue). Clicking apply-continue â†’ existing PredictionMatch beat renders (KuPS vs HJK, â‚¬400 prize, PREDICT â†’ CTA). Full happy path: intro â†’ Q1 â†’ reveal â†’ Q2 â†’ reveal â†’ Q3 â†’ reveal â†’ Q4 â†’ reveal â†’ Q5 â†’ reveal â†’ report â†’ email â†’ apply â†’ match â†’ all selectors present, all data flowing, no console errors, no broken images.
test_credentials: X-Admin-Token: putki-hq-admin (BACK_OFFICE_TOKEN). Public funnel has no auth.
critical_code_review_comments: FORBIDDEN_PHRASES list in /app/backend/voita_quiz_config.py is well-scoped â€” it intentionally allows 'guaranteed loss' (educational, describes the house's mathematical edge from the bettor's perspective) while blocking outcome promises ('guaranteed win', 'increase your win rate', 'voitat varmasti', 'takuuvoitto'). Comment in code explains the compliance line clearly.

voita_profiles.resolve_profile uses longest-match-wins with priority tiebreak via (matches, priority) tuple sort desc â€” correct algorithm and verified by tie-break test (quiet_sharp priority 90 / 2 matches beats underdog_hunter priority 75 / 1 match).

sanitize_profiles + sanitize_quiz_config both fall back to DEFAULT_* when input is structurally broken â€” solid blanking-prevention pattern. Linter runs on every text field so editorial cannot accidentally ship non-compliant copy from back-office.

Minor: /api/voita/profile/resolve is unauthenticated and accepts arbitrary answer maps. Not a security issue (no PII / no writes) but could be abused for resolver-enumeration. Optional: add rate limiting if abuse surfaces.

Minor: ReportScreen / ApplyScreen / LessonReveal components live in VoitaRaffle.jsx â€” if VoitaRaffle.jsx is approaching 700+ lines, consider extracting into /components/voita/ for testability and reuse (e.g., if the same Report screen appears in any future onboarding flow).

Minor: profile match_rules use exact tag string match â€” typo in editorial back-office (e.g., 'bias_favorit') silently fails the rule with no warning. Optional: surface a validation warning in /back-office/voita-quiz when a profile rule references a q_key/tag combo that doesn't exist in the current quiz config.
seed_data_creation: No new seed. Temporarily injected 'TEST_iter33_marker_text' into curious_learner.edge_en via PUT /api/admin/settings to verify persistence, then restored original profile list in same test run. No residual test data on /api/settings/public after the suite.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter33 product reframe fully validated. New backend pieces: voita_quiz_config.py (5 lessons with reveal blocks + FORBIDDEN_PHRASES compliance linter), voita_profiles.py (10 profiles + resolve_profile longest-match-wins-priority-tiebreak), POST /api/voita/profile/resolve, voita_predictor_profiles in /api/settings/public, compliance linter on PUT /api/admin/settings. New frontend pieces: VoitaRaffle.jsx step order introâ†’quizâ†’reveal (per lesson, Ă—5)â†’reportâ†’emailâ†’applyâ†’matchâ†’pickâ†’scoreâ†’review. All step screens use data-testid: intro-start-cta, quiz-step-{key}, quiz-option-{key}-{v}, lesson-reveal-{key}, lesson-reveal-fact/why/personalized/application/continue, report-step, report-profile-name/diagnosis/weakness/edge/hooks/continue, email-gate-submit, apply-step, apply-continue. Continue button copy switches on isLast (Lesson 5) from 'NEXT LESSON â†’' to 'SEE MY REPORT â†’'. Email submit reads 'SEND ME MY REPORT â†’' (not 'CONTINUE'). To rerun: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://pelisignaali-fi.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_sprint_voita_lessons.py -v. Forbidden phrase list canonical at /app/backend/voita_quiz_config.py FORBIDDEN_PHRASES. iter32 regression (test_sprint_voita_hero + voita_engine + voita_recent_winners) still 41/41 PASS â€” no regressions introduced by the reframe.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA â€” clean iteration. Backend 11/11 + regression 41/41 + frontend e2e all green. Resolver math (quiet_sharp tiebreak), compliance linter behavior (blocks promises, allows educational 'guaranteed loss'), and full funnel introâ†’match transition all verified end-to-end.
